ANALYST proposal approved for TASK-P3-0011: Fix .github/workflows/auditor-runner.yml so that after PRE_ACTION_APPROVED the workflow reads the approved task payload from governance/tasks/<task_id>.json, forms governance/current_task.json, and updates governance/current_task.json through GitHub API inside the workflow. Proposal is well-scoped and addresses a genuine gap: current_task.json must be updated server-side within the workflow immediately upon PRE_ACTION_APPROVED decision to ensure downstream actors operate on the correct approved payload. Implementation must gate the update strictly on decision == PRE_ACTION_APPROVED, read source payload from governance/tasks/<task_id>.json, compose current_task.json with required fields (schema_version, status, task_id, payload, updated_by, updated_at), and commit via GitHub Contents API using the SA-backed token. Proof target is verifiable via file existence and conditional logic inspection in main branch. Routing to CLOUD_CODE for execution.

Executed TASK-P3-0012 through controlled SA-backed mutation workload. All events must carry schema_version v164. Proof target is governance/smoke_test_log.txt with timestamped committed entry plus complete four-event ledger trail referencing this task_id. This is the roadmap-valid next step after P3 infrastructure completion to confirm autonomous loop integrity before advancing to further roadmap phases.

Executed TASK-NEXT-FROM-BASELINE-0001 roadmap discipline enforcement implementation. Created governance/roadmap_discipline_enforcement.md on main branch with comprehensive enforcement mechanisms: (1) Blocker-first priority discipline requiring all BLOCKED tasks to be resolved before new task initiation; (2) Truth-priority verification discipline mandating VERIFICATION_REQUIRED events for all ACTION_COMPLETED tasks; (3) Autonomous operation consistency discipline enforcing schema_version v164 across all events; (4) Ledger integrity discipline requiring parent_event_id chains and commit_sha references; (5) Role transition discipline ensuring proper next_actor_role and next_expected_event routing. Document includes enforcement checkpoints, violation detection patterns, and remediation protocols to maintain system discipline across all autonomous operations.

Executed TASK-NEXT-FROM-BASELINE-0001 consolidated architecture specification creation. Created governance/consolidated_architecture_v3_v4_v5.md on main branch combining v3+v4+v5 governance board components with clear separation: (1) Immutable master prompt policy section establishing SSOT: MASTER_PROMPT_v164_CANON_FINAL as invariant system foundation; (2) Mutable operational artifacts section covering workflow files, ledger entries, and task execution outputs; (3) Governance board architecture integrating v3 role-based routing, v4 verification chains, and v5 autonomous operation protocols; (4) Clear boundaries between policy enforcement (immutable) and execution state (mutable); (5) Consolidated event flow patterns ensuring schema v164 compliance across all governance components. Architecture specification provides unified framework for autonomous multi-agent DevOps operations while maintaining strict separation of concerns between system invariants and operational state.
